condition: The part is dominated by a very long, slim rectangular rail with a shallow full-length top layer, so it is not just a single-height strip. Small circular removed features sit near the rail ends along the same narrow band; these are recesses or cuts, not raised posts. One end has a wider block-like extension with its own matching shallow top layer and additional removed features. The end detailing includes both shallow circular recessing and a much deeper cutout, creating a stepped depth relationship through and below the lower body.
